channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-08
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates in both the `scienceverse/metacheck` and `JamieCummins/regcheck` projects. In `metacheck`, Lakens has made significant improvements to the `data_check` branch, enhancing cache functionality, preserving original data, and refining hardcoded folders. Meanwhile, in `regcheck`, the "staging" branch has undergone substantial updates, including an update to the default OpenAI model, aesthetic bug fixes, and enhanced backend handling of insufficient evidence. These advancements demonstrate the community's commitment to improving research tools and highlight the connections between projects, such as the focus on data handling and evidence management. As our community continues to collaborate and innovate, we celebrate the progress made and look forward to the impact these updates will have on our research endeavors. With these updates, we're one step closer to creating more robust and efficient research tools.

54 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck27 commits
metacheck18 commits
regcheck3 commits
statcheck2 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. This merge was done to incorporate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as specified by the commit message "admin updates". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch that was worked on in these commits. The changes made in these commits are limited to the merge and administrative updates on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
